plan.failureSummary: The deterministic run failed because the page rendered a different layout ('Set 1' fields, including 'Age Group' radio buttons) than what was recorded in the step cache (which expected a 'Select your occupation' combobox).
observedIndicators: Deterministic mode was active using stale or mismatched step cache
Failure screenshot displays 'Age Group' radio buttons instead of the expected 'Select your occupation' combobox
Tool call failed to resolve HTML element '[role=\"combobox\"]' or 'Select your occupation' button
Historical runs show a pattern of intermittent successes and failures consistent with rotating form layouts

remediationSteps.summary: Clear Page AI cache and retry the test
remediationSteps.details: Trigger a retry with clearPageAiCache set to true. This will clear the stale deterministic cache and force page.ai to dynamically inspect and fill the form fields currently shown on the screen.

remediationSteps.summary: Disable deterministic caching for this unstable survey test
remediationSteps.details: Disable deterministic mode or caching for this specific test file ('unstable-survey.test.ts') because the target website uses rotating/dynamic forms that naturally invalidate static step caches.

plan.notes: The visual evidence shows a dynamic/unstable page layout with a 'Set 1' indicator and different form fields. Deterministic caching is not suitable for this unstable test because the form rotates layouts across different runs, causing cached selectors to fail. Clearing the cache and retrying will allow the autonomous agent to re-evaluate and fill the form successfully.
